signals.headline: CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN FIRST ROUND | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN FIRST ROUND | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105** in Game 2 of their first-round playoff series, establishing a 2-0 series lead.[3][4][7] Donovan Mitchell led the Cavaliers with 30 points, 7 rebounds, and 5 assists, while James Harden added 28 points.[7] The Cavaliers never trailed in the victory.[
